ns0:entry.ns0:title: AI4Finance-Foundation/FinGPT
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AI4Finance-Foundation/FinGPT
Language: jupyter-notebook
FinGPT: Open-Source Financial Large Language Models! Revolutionize 🔥 We release the trained model on HuggingFace.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataExpert-io/data-engineer-handbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
This is a repo with links to everything you'd ever want to learn about data engineering

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/accelerated-computing-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/accelerated-computing-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
NVIDIA curated collection of educational resources related to general purpose GPU programming.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/cosmos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/cosmos
Language: jupyter-notebook
NVIDIA Cosmos is an open platform of world models, datasets, and tools that enables developers to build Physical AI for robots, autonomous vehicles, smart infrastructure, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-VL
Language: jupyter-notebook
Qwen3-VL is the multimodal large language model series developed by Qwen team, Alibaba Cloud.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SakanaAI/AI-Scientist
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist
Language: jupyter-notebook
The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery 🧑‍🔬

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alirezadir/Machine-Learning-Interviews
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alirezadir/Machine-Learning-Interviews
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repo is meant to serve as a guide for Machine Learning/AI technical interviews.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-cookbooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-cookbooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: borglab/gtsam
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/borglab/gtsam
Language: jupyter-notebook
GTSAM is a library of C++ classes that implement smoothing and mapping (SAM) in robotics and vision, using factor graphs and Bayes networks as the underlying computing paradigm rather than sparse matrices.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo for the Complete Agentic AI Engineering Course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/llm_engineering
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/llm_engineering
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo to accompany my mastering LLM engineering course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov3
Language: jupyter-notebook
Reference PyTorch implementation and models for DINOv3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/segment-anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/segment-anything
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the SegmentAnything Model (SAM), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: frankwxu/digital-forensics-lab
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/frankwxu/digital-forensics-lab
Language: jupyter-notebook
Free hands-on digital forensics labs for students and faculty

ns0:entry.ns0:title: langchain-ai/langchain-academy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain-academy
Language: jupyter-notebook

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lyogavin/airllm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lyogavin/airllm
Language: jupyter-notebook
AirLLM 70B inference with single 4GB GPU

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
Language: jupyter-notebook
12 Weeks, 24 Lessons, AI for All!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pyannote/pyannote-audio
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pyannote/pyannote-audio
Language: jupyter-notebook
Neural building blocks for speaker diarization: speech activity detection, speaker change detection, overlapped speech detection, speaker embedding

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shap/shap
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shap/shap
Language: jupyter-notebook
A game theoretic approach to explain the output of any machine learning model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: udlbook/udlbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/udlbook/udlbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
